name: confluence
description: Interact with Atlassian Confluence via the confluence-cli binary installed on the gateway host. Assumes the host is already authenticated. Supports reading pages, searching, listing spaces and children, creating/updating/deleting pages, managing attachments, comments, content properties, exporting pages, and profile management. Access is controlled at two independent layers: (1) command-level allow/deny lists, and (2) space-level allow lists for reads and writes — both layers are optional and default to fully open.

allowCommands.description: If set, only these command paths are permitted. A command path is the leading subcommand token(s) before any flags, e.g. 'read', 'search', 'create', 'profile list'. Prefix matching applies: 'create' covers 'create-child' as well. Omit to allow all commands (subject to denyCommands).

denyCommands.description: These command paths are always blocked, even if listed in allowCommands. Deny beats allow. Prefix matching applies: 'create' blocks both 'create' and 'create-child'. Defaults to [] (nothing blocked) when no config is provided.

allowReadSpaces.description: If set, read operations (read, info, children, attachments, comments, property-list, property-get, export, edit, find, search with --space) are only permitted for pages/spaces in this list. Space keys are matched case-insensitively. Omit or leave empty to allow reading from all spaces. For page IDs, the space is resolved via a 'confluence info' lookup (results are cached). For URLs, the space key is parsed directly from the path.

allowWriteSpaces.description: If set, write operations (create, create-child, update, delete, move, copy-tree, attachment-upload, attachment-delete, comment, property-set, property-delete) are only permitted for pages/spaces in this list. Space keys are matched case-insensitively. Omit or leave empty to allow writing to all spaces. Note: comment-delete is not covered by space enforcement — use denyCommands to block it entirely.

requireSpaceOnSearch.description: When true, search calls without a --space flag are rejected. Forces agents to always scope searches. Default: false. IMPORTANT: only the --space flag is inspected. CQL expressions embedded in the query string (e.g. 'space IN (...)') are NOT parsed or enforced by this tool.

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for each confluence invocation, including internal info lookups for space resolution. Default: 30.

profile.description: Default profile name. Prepended as --profile <value> to every call when --profile is not already in the agent's args. Also forwarded to internal info lookups. Optional.
